name: Century Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Century Therapeutics is a biotechnology company developing allogeneic pluripotent stem cell therapies for autoimmune diseases, including type 1 diabetes (T1D), and cancer. The company's lead product candidate is CNTY-813, an iPSC-derived beta islet cell therapy for T1D, currently in IND-enabling studies. Another candidate, CNTY-308, is a CD19-targeted CAR-iT cell therapy for B-cell-mediated autoimmune diseases, also in IND-enabling studies.

exposures.sentence: We are a biotechnology company harnessing the power of allogeneic pluripotent stem cell therapies to develop potentially curative cell therapy products for autoimmune diseases, including T1D, and cancer.

catalysts.event: Submit IND application for CNTY-813 to the FDA
catalysts.sentence: We expect to submit an IND application for CNTY-813 to the FDA in as early as the fourth quarter of 2026.
Following successful completion of these IND-enabling studies, and the receipt of requisite regulatory authorization, we expect to initiate clinical studies in 2026.
